name: address-volunteered-at-listings-details-saved-not-lost
description: Real-estate flow. User at WEB_COLLECT_LISTINGS_DETAILS types their CONTACT address ('Address: 5 main street, austin') — NOT a property listing. Bot must side-channel the address into websiteData.contactAddress AND stay at WEB_COLLECT_LISTINGS_DETAILS to keep collecting listings. Earlier behavior: parseListingText would try to interpret '5 main street' as a property address with no price/beds/baths and produce a junk listing entry. The address was lost from contact info AND a bad listing was created.
